content.en:
Although Ouyang Jiu'er didn't know Ye Tian's talent, it could be seen from the three extreme Dao techniques that Ye Tian definitely had Dao-level natal talent, and there was more than one.

And she only has one Dao-level natal talent!

Of course, if she wanted to increase her Dao-level natal talent, she could do it, and there were many ways she knew.

But sometimes, it is not a good thing to pay too much for the sake of purely increasing the Dao-level natal talent, and it is better to spend time on cultivation.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian has exerted another ability - Forbidden Body!

I saw that the various hole card attacks cast by those True Ancestors were blocked by Ye Tian's forbidden body one after another, and they were not injured at all.

Then, Ye Tian cast the forbidden spear, which pierced through the body of a true ancestor.

All the True Ancestors who did not reach the level of the top True Ancestors died one after another, and the top True Ancestors were also hit hard.

Ye Tian didn't kill those top true ancestors, it was really unnecessary, it was easy to kill a top true ancestor, but it took a little time, he didn't want to delay time.

Swish!

Ye Tian easily crossed those True Ancestors and shuttled in the direction of the Demon Suppression Stone.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Demon Suppression Stone.

"Jiu'er, quickly open the Demon Suppression Stone, take out the resources inside, don't waste time!"

Ye Tian urged.

Ouyang Jiu'er would not deliberately drop the chain at this time, and hurriedly punched out one seal after another and printed it on the Demon Suppression Stone.

Thundered!!!!

The Demon Stone shook, gradually forming a portal to an unknown space.

"Brother Ye, you guard the entrance, I'll go in and get treasure resources!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Wow!

Ouyang Jiu'er entered the Demon Suppression Stone, while Ye Tian was guarding outside.

Soon, a group of True Ancestors arrived, including those top True Ancestors who had been seriously injured.

However, these True Ancestors did not act immediately, but sealed off the surroundings.

Obviously, they also knew that they were not opponents, and they did not dare to attack Ye Tian, after all, the True Ancestor was also afraid of death.

But as time passed, more and more True Ancestors gathered.

A few minutes passed, and Ouyang Jiu'er came out.

And at this time, there was a terrifying aura in the distance, far surpassing other True Ancestors, and it was a Supreme True Ancestor.

"Jiu'er, we have to go, the Le Yan True Ancestor of the Zixia Sect is here, although I am not afraid of him, but once I am entangled by him, the Zixia Sect will support the arrival of more Supreme True Ancestors at any time!"

Ye Tiandao.

"It's already, you can go!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

Ye Tian then directly included Ouyang Jiu'er in the inner universe, so that it would not be easy for the words of battle to affect Ouyang Jiu'er.

Otherwise, Ye Tian would not be able to guarantee that he would protect Ouyang Jiu'er under the attack of a Supreme True Ancestor.

After putting Ouyang Jiu'er away, Ye Tian performed the Middle Thousand Dao Technique-Tiangang Extreme Speed!

In an instant, Ye Tian passed through the encirclement of many True Ancestors, and the speed was unimaginably fast.

"Quick, stop him!"

The true ancestors of the Zixia Sect roared.

They didn't expect Ye Tian's speed to be so fast, and they didn't pay attention at once, and they were rushed out of the encirclement by the other party.

But their speed can't catch up with Ye Tian at all.

Secret Exit.

As soon as Ye Tian came out, he encountered Le Yan True Ancestor.

The other party blocked the void with a Dao weapon, and the moment Ye Tian came out, he cast a Dao technique—a painting that shook the sky!

I saw a landscape painting appear out of thin air, really turned into a mountain and river, and suppressed it.

Ye Tianshi exhibited the Ten Heavenly Prison Dragon, and collided with Le Yan True Ancestor's Dao Technique.

I saw ten prison dragons roaring in the sky, directly shattering Le Yan True Ancestor's Dao technique.

Immediately, Ye Tian cast another Sky Splitting Technique and slammed into Le Yan True Ancestor's body.

In a flash.

Le Yan True Ancestor was injured.

"You are the True Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws!"

Le Yan True Ancestor said coldly.

Ye Tian didn't feel strange that his identity was recognized, in fact, he didn't need to hide it now.

When he cast the Forbidden Body before, he knew that he couldn't hide his identity, and the Dao Technique could be replaced by another Dao Technique, but the Forbidden Body seemed to be the only one in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Therefore, there is no need for him to hide his identity.

In fact, before Ye Tian came, he thought that he could easily help Ouyang Jiu'er take away the resource treasures without fighting.

But I still didn't expect that the secret realm was occupied by the Zixia Sect, although the danger inside was also broken by the Zixia Sect, but it had to be confronted by the Zixia Sect.

Of course, compared to the harvest, Ye Tian felt that exposure would be exposed, and it would be a big deal to face the Zixia Sect.

Once he obtains the World Promotion Secret Technique and the Dao Codex of the Supreme Sword Dao Dao Ancestor, his strength will increase dramatically, and even the top Supreme True Ancestor may not be able to help him at that time.

So, he has nothing to fear.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, you dare to break into our Zixia Sect's territory, kill our True Ancestor, and rob our resources and treasures!" Le Yan True Ancestor said angrily.

"Phew, this secret realm is obviously a secret realm of a friend of mine, otherwise how could we easily open the secret realm and the treasure house inside? You occupy this place and rob the resources here, you are excessive!" Ye Tian retorted.

"The territory occupied by our Zixia Sect is our Zixia Sect's!"

Le Yan True Ancestor said.

Although he also knew that this secret realm was really the secret realm of that woman, or the secret realm of the other sect, but now it belonged to their Zixia Sect, and any treasures in it belonged to their Zixia Sect, and no one could snatch it.

Kill!

Le Yan True Ancestor attacked hard.

However, his strength was still much weaker than Ye Tian.

Fortunately, Ye Tian didn't have the heart to fight him, otherwise, with all his strength, he might not be able to kill Le Yan True Ancestor.

But the Purple Xia Sect's Supreme True Ancestor must be rushing over, so he didn't have time to kill Le Yan True Ancestor.

Le Yan True Ancestor's various Dao techniques are mainly banned, and he also uses a forbidden Dao weapon, if Ye Tian is given time, he will definitely be able to easily break the ban.

But now he is constantly fighting with Le Yan True Ancestor, and there is almost no time to break the ban.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, you can't escape. No matter how fast you are, you can't break the ban, your speed is useless, once the many supreme true ancestors of our Zixia Sect arrive, you will die!"

Le Yan True Ancestor said with great joy.

He knew that Ye Tian had some boundary stones on his body, and there must be a big secret on his body, if he could kill Ye Tian, he might be able to go further.

Moreover, this time it was Ye Tian who took the initiative to attack their Zixia Sect's territory, even if he was killed, Black Wind Mountain would have nothing to say.

"It seems that you have to perform the Thousand Dao Techniques of the Ten Thousand True Spears!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately.

He opened the Great Wilderness Law Body, an amplification type of the Thousand Dao Technique, and held the Ten Thousand True Spear condensed by the Thousand Dao Technique, and threw it fiercely.

Burst!

The true spear runs through!

Le Yan True Ancestor tried to block this attack, but was directly pierced through his body by the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear, and he was injured a lot at once.

And the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear was castrated unabated, bombarding the Dao Weapon Forbidden Barrier.

Bang!

The ban was forced, and Ye Tian used Tiangang to shuttle away quickly.

With this departure, Le Yan True Ancestor couldn't catch up at all.

"Damn, he actually practiced the Thousand Dao Technique of the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear!" Le Yan True Ancestor said jealously.

The Great Wilderness Law Body plus the Ten Thousand True Spears, just these two Thousand Dao Techniques alone have the ability to kill him.

Soon after.

The three Supreme True Ancestors of the Zixia Sect have arrived.

"Le Yan, where is the enemy?"

Huangguang True Ancestor, one of the three strongest True Ancestors, asked.

"Ran!"

Le Yan True Ancestor said helplessly.

"What, ran away?" Huang Guang True Ancestor sneered: "Le Yan, you are also the strongest True Ancestor, and you are proficient in the forbidden Dao technique, you can even let the enemy escape, and you don't even have the ability to stop it." Could it be that the enemy is still invincible True Ancestor?"

"The enemy is the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor!" Le Yan True Ancestor said: "The other party's strength is even stronger than the strength he once showed in the Liuli Sect, and he has also practiced the Ten Thousand Dao Technique Ten Thousand Evil True Spear, and with the Great Wilderness Law Body, he broke my blockade with one blow, and he has also practiced the Middle Thousand Dao Technique Tiangang Extreme Speed, I can't catch up at all!"

"What, it's the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, damn fellow, go, let's kill into his Void Heaven True Kingdom!"

Huang Guang True Ancestor said angrily.

"Don't be impulsive!"

Another Supreme True Ancestor dissuaded, "We are excavating an ancient ruin, that ancient relic is the stronghold of the Eight Heavens Force where the domain realm was born, once the excavation is successful, it will be of great help to our Zixia Sect." At this time, there is no need for us to offend Black Wind Mountain, otherwise once that ruin is discovered by Black Wind Mountain, with their temperament, they will definitely come to destroy and rob the opportunity!"

"Okay, then when that relic is excavated, we'll come back to trouble the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor!"

Huang Guang True Ancestor Dao.
